englishDefinitions: To claim the front passenger seat in a car before anyone else can.
By extension, to claim a preferred position or privilege first.
persianTranslation: جلوِ ماشین را زودتر از بقیه رزرو کردن
examples: I called shotgun before we got to the car.
Whoever calls shotgun gets the front seat.
She called shotgun on the best chair in the van.
